textByHashes.737d388941450fff9157d70875cf13ede8f17a53: The dwarves are not surface dwellers. They live in an underground city, like us!
textByHashes.6194c31d815a0b9d35f5074d43b52a525a6f8128: You shouldn't judge all dwarves because of that!
textByHashes.e2d16d68116e61b4505a7067fcfac60817d12692: You can't deny it's done some good. Think of how happy everyone is trying surface foods in the market!
textByHashes.451dc131503d230cda38fbfb69204878f709a77c: Please don't be offended by my friend's attitude, surface-dweller. I'm sure you understand why we need to be cautious.
